name: The Last Remnant RPG
description:
Set in an alternate version of The Last Remnant

You take the role of the main character in the setting. The nations vie for control of the Remnants. You, the user, take center stage as whatever race and gender you wish to play. It's time to write your own story within the world of The Last Remnant.

I intentionally did not write in any characters other than the Conqueror. Even then, I'm not certain how well I implemented him into it. If you want to adventure with any of the characters or familiar Remnants, you'll have to add them into the story first. I did this so that you could create your own scenarios as you like.

I've described and added Hinnah and Hannah, David, The Four Generals, and Glenys fairly successfully, so you should be able to do the same with a little creative writing.

This is my first scenario setting. I imagine there will probably be issues. I've had trouble getting JLLM to understand the concept of a Remnant, but I think I finally got them to stop talking. Constructive criticism and suggestions are welcome, and possibly needed.
creator: DotuLord
